name: Dilwyn Tufted Ottoman - Orange - Christopher Knight Home: Rectangular Upholstered Bench for Entryway
description: Enjoy this exceedingly plush Christopher Knight Home Dilwyn Ottoman. Not only will it add that little something extra to your living room that you are yearning for, but it will be one of the most comfortable places to put your feet with the added benefit of providing extra seating in a pinch when you have one to many guests over. This ottoman will not disappoint and might even become the subject of your living room if you’re not careful.
